name: Orlo
description:
Orlo is more than just a social media management platform. Designed for managing and optimizing digital conversations across social media, SMS, and live chat, it's ideal for businesses and organizations looking to streamline their digital customer service and engagement. The customer is always right, right?

Here’s why you’ll love communication through Orlo:

  • Custom pricing based on the features and usage requirements
  • A unified inbox means you can manage social media, SMS, and live chat conversations in one place
  • Follow customer interactions across different channels with customer journey tracking
  • Engagement analytics help you gain insights into customer engagement and let you optimize customer service
  • Monitor and post to Facebook, X, Instagram, Pinterest, LinkedIn, and more. Also, it integrates with SMS and live chat.

Key Features:

✅ Omnichannel communication

✅ Integrated customer journeys

✅ Engagement analytics
what_people_say:
What people say :

With Orlo, you can manage all your digital interactions in one place, ensuring a seamless customer experience. Whether it’s through text or DM, it makes sure your communication and engagement is unified on one platform.

Here’s what customers say:

“Orlo has improved our digital customer service tenfold. It’s easy to talk to our customers and monitor our communications with them across channels. Nobody else in the market seems to be doing this, but it’s been invaluable.”

“It’s a great platform for omnichannel communication. I wish it had  more advanced analytics.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Simpler setup and user interface
  • 🚫 More detailed analytics for customer interactions
  • 🚫 Integration with additional customer service and CRM systems
